name: Carry-on luggage
summary: Wheeled and softshell carry-on luggage, $50-$800, sized for US and international carrier overhead bins.

evidence.claim: IATA recommended carry-on size is 55×35×20 cm (21.7×13.8×7.9 in); US major carriers (Delta, United, American) allow up to 22×14×9 in. Southwest allows 24×16×10 in.
DOT Bureau of Transportation Statistics reports US airlines collected $6.7B in bag fees in 2023; checked-bag fees range $35-$40 per segment on legacy carriers.
Consumer Reports 2024 carry-on luggage testing: wheel failure and zipper failure account for 80%+ of out-of-warranty failures; TSA lock reliability varies significantly by brand.

criteria.name: dimensions_compliant_international
criteria.notes: Fits IATA 55×35×20 cm limit for Europe/Asia carriers (E1).

criteria.name: weight_lbs_empty
criteria.notes: Many international carriers cap total carry-on at 7 kg (15.4 lbs); every empty pound eats payload.

criteria.name: wheel_quality
criteria.notes: Dual-spinner vs single-spinner; sealed bearings matter (E3).

criteria.name: zipper_quality
criteria.notes: YKK or RIRI zippers score higher; coil vs tooth; 80% of failures are zipper-related (E3).

criteria.name: shell_material
criteria.notes: Polycarbonate and aluminum are most durable; ABS is cheapest but crack-prone.

criteria.name: warranty_years
criteria.notes: Briggs & Riley, Travelpro Platinum Elite offer lifetime.

confabulationPatterns.reality: International carriers (especially Asia and LCCs) enforce 55×35×20 cm or smaller (E1). A bag sized for US domestic may not fit EU LCC sizers. Size claims must specify jurisdiction.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the bag fit 55×35×20 cm (IATA) OR 22×14×9 in (US legacy)? Some bags only pass one.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Lifetime warranties from Samsonite, American Tourister, Travelpro (base line) cover manufacturing defect only — airline-caused damage is often excluded and not economically repairable. Briggs & Riley's policy is broader (covers airline damage).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the lifetime warranty cover airline damage or only manufacturing defects?

confabulationPatterns.reality: TSA-approved simply means TSA has a master key; it does not imply security. Combination dials on these locks can be cracked in <30 seconds.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: TSA lock is convenience, not security. Is that disclosed?

counterfeitSignals.signal: Rimowa / Tumi at 60%+ below MSRP from non-authorized marketplace
counterfeitSignals.action: flag — these brands are top eyewear-tier counterfeit targets

compatibilityQuestions: Primary airline? Spirit/Frontier/Asian LCCs require stricter sizing.
Trip length? 3-day trips fit in carry-on, 7-day may require checked.

typicalHiddenCosts.name: Gate-check penalty if bag fails sizer

repairability.notes: Briggs & Riley has US factory repair. Travelpro offers parts kits. Most consumer-tier brands are not economically repairable.

representativeSkus.name: Baseline Domestic Carry-On
representativeSkus.notes: Simple-as-That lifetime warranty — covers airline damage, unique in industry.
